prompt: A highly detailed, professional studio photograph of a confident and smiling Caucasian businessman in his early 30s with short, well-groomed brown hair and a neat beard. He is captured from the waist up, standing directly in front of a solid, clean, pastel light-green studio background. The man is wearing a perfectly tailored, modern dark charcoal grey suit jacket with matching suit trousers, a crisp and pristine white button-down dress shirt, and a solid satin royal blue necktie neatly knotted. A folded white pocket square peeks subtly out of his breast pocket. He is looking directly at the camera with warm, engaged eyes and a bright, trustworthy smile that shows his teeth. In his left hand, he holds up a modern black smartphone facing forward, displaying colorful business data analytics charts, bar graphs, and infographic diagrams on its screen. With his right hand, he is giving a confident thumbs-up gesture next to the phone. The lighting is soft, even, and professional, characteristic of corporate commercial advertising photography, creating gentle highlights on his face and suit while casting no harsh shadows. Every texture is crisp and clear, from the fine fabric of the wool suit to the smooth glass of the mobile phone screen. The overall composition is perfectly centered, balanced, and clean, conveying success, financial growth, and modern business technology. The image has a sharp focus throughout, high contrast, and vivid colors, shot with a high-end DSLR camera and a premium portrait lens to deliver a premium, stock photo aesthetic.
